## Content to Improve

**Topic:**
<!-- e.g., Apache Spark -->

**File(s):**
<!-- e.g., `14-TechStack/DataEngineering/ApacheSpark/Visual.md` -->

**Current Issue:**
<!-- Describe what's wrong or what could be improved -->

## Proposed Changes

**What should be changed?**
<!-- Detailed description of the improvement -->

**Why is this change needed?**
<!-- Explain the benefit -->

## Type of Improvement

<!-- Select all that apply: -->
- [ ] Fix error or typo
- [ ] Add missing information
- [ ] Expand diagrams/visuals
- [ ] Update outdated content
- [ ] Improve clarity/readability
- [ ] Add examples
- [ ] Add interactive demo
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots, links, or other context -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I've verified the issue exists
- [ ] I've reviewed the [Contribution Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I'm willing to submit a PR for this improvement
